series.name: Pip & Lulu
series.style_block: Soft 3D cartoon animation in the style of modern preschool shows: rounded plush-like characters with big warm friendly eyes, bright pastel colors, soft even daylight, gentle slow camera moves, polished high-quality render, cozy storybook world.
series.music_style: playful ukulele and glockenspiel with soft hand claps

characters.name: Pip
characters.description: a round fluffy baby panda cub with big friendly eyes, soft black-and-white fur, and a little red scarf

characters.name: Lulu
characters.description: a soft cream-colored baby bunny with long floppy ears, rosy cheeks, and a small yellow bow
